The '''''Adamant''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruiser]] under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]].

==History==
In [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]], she fell under attack by an Imperial insurgency group known as the [[Second Imperium]] in the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]] while transporting [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] cores and [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] emplacements to [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]].

This [[Raid on Coruscant (Second Imperium Crisis)|raid]] was lead by ex-[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE]] pilot [[Qorl]] under the command of the fallen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Brakiss]] who operated the [[Shadow Academy]], an ally of the Imperium. Qorl utilized a modified [[Assault shuttle/Legends|assault shuttle]] to board the cruiser, jettison the Republic crew in [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]], and stole the ''Adamant'' and her cargo.

==Appearances==

*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Under Siege]]'' {{Mo}}
